description: Persistent agent wake cycles with code-aware pulse checks, scheduled orchestration runs, and session recovery. Leverages existing PTYProcessRunner + ProjectContextReader. HeartbeatService actor manages pulse loops via Swift structured concurrency (TaskGroup).
goals: Code-aware heartbeat pulses (git diff, test results, story progress)
Scheduled orchestration runs via cron expressions
Auto-recovery on app restart (resume from last known state)

user_stories.title: HeartbeatConfig + ScheduledRun GRDB models
user_stories.description: New GRDB Records with migration. HeartbeatConfig: id, sessionId (FK), slotId (FK?), intervalMs (Int, default 30000), enabled (Bool), lastPulseAt (Date?), lastPulseResult (String? JSON), consecutiveFailures (Int, default 0), maxFailures (Int, default 5), timestamps. ScheduledRun: id, projectPath, prdPath, cronExpression (String?), triggerType (TriggerType enum: cron, git_push, file_change, manual, prd_update), triggerConfig (String? JSON), roleTemplateName (String?), budgetPreset (String?), enabled (Bool), lastRunAt (Date?), lastRunResult (String?), nextRunAt (Date?), createdAt. HeartbeatRepository actor with CRUD, update_pulse (resets failures), record_failure (increments), fetch_due_runs (nextRunAt <= now).

user_stories.title: HeartbeatService actor — code-aware pulse engine
user_stories.description: New actor HeartbeatService. Manages Task per active heartbeat config. Each pulse: 1) Check process alive via PTYProcessRunner.getProcessInfo. 2) Run git diff --stat on worktree (via existing GitService). 3) Parse last test output from .crossroads/logs/ for pass/fail counts. 4) Read prd.json for story completion status. 5) Check merge readiness (git merge-base --is-ancestor). 6) Emit PulseResult struct: alive, gitChanges, testsPassed, testsFailed, storiesCompleted, mergeable, errors. 7) Update HeartbeatConfig.lastPulseResult. 8) On failure: increment consecutiveFailures, at maxFailures → auto-pause slot. Wire into CockpitViewModel — subscribe to pulse results for live health display.

user_stories.title: Scheduled run engine
user_stories.description: HeartbeatService.startScheduler() — Task that checks ScheduledRun table every 60s. Cron parser: CronExpression struct that parses 5-field standard cron, calculates next DateTime. On trigger: 1) Create CockpitSession. 2) Apply role template (if specified). 3) Apply budget preset (if specified). 4) CockpitViewModel.activate with PRD path. 5) Store result + calculate next run. Triggers: cron (time-based), manual (on-demand). FileSystemWatcher for file_change trigger (watch prd.json modifications). Scheduled runs persist across app restart (loaded from GRDB on startup). UI: ScheduleManagerView — CRUD for runs, cron presets, enable/disable toggle.
tests: scheduled run fires at correct time

user_stories.title: Session auto-recovery on startup
user_stories.description: On app launch: AppState.loadAndRecover() async. Flow: 1) Query GRDB for non-closed CockpitSessions. 2) For each: check if agent processes still alive (PTYProcessRunner). 3) If alive: create HeartbeatConfig, resume monitoring. 4) If dead + progress incomplete: show recovery banner. RecoveryBannerView: shows session info, slot states, last progress. Options: Resume (re-spawn agents with handoff context from last progress), Discard (close session). Re-spawned agents get AGENT.md with recovery flag + previous progress summary. Wire into existing AppState.loadLastSession() — enhance with recovery logic.

user_stories.title: Heartbeat + schedule manager UI
user_stories.description: SwiftUI views: 1) HeartbeatStatusView — per-slot heartbeat indicator: green/yellow/red dot, last pulse time, failure count, enable toggle. Integrated into CockpitSlotCardView header. 2) PulseTimelineView — vertical timeline of last 50 pulses per slot. Dot color = pulse health. Tap for details. 3) ScheduleManagerView — List of ScheduledRuns with enable toggle, cron expression display, next run countdown, last result badge. 'Add Schedule' sheet: cron builder with friendly presets ('Every night at 2am', 'Every hour', 'On PRD change'), PRD picker, template + budget preset selectors. 4) NextRunCountdown — live countdown timer. Access from cockpit panel as 'Schedule' tab.
